title: scelochilus corydaloides
intro: Scelochilus corydaloides, also known as the 'Fly Orchid', is a species of orchid found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Scelochilus corydaloides include its use in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. The herbal preparations of Scelochilus corydaloides include infusions and decoctions made from the plant's leaves and roots, which are used to treat various health conditions.
